Hero.description: ELAOUAD designs, engineers and delivers exceptional spaces - from BIM concept to completion, across 4 continents.

Blueprint.label: From Vision to Structure
Blueprint.title: Every line becomes matter. Every intention becomes space.
Blueprint.description: Before the first stone, there is the precision of the drawing. Our process transforms architectural intent into built reality, step by step.

Manifesto.label: Our Philosophy
Manifesto.subtitle: Architecture as artistic act and technical responsibility.

Services.label: Our Expertise
Services.title: Five disciplines, one signature.
Services.subtitle: From concept to delivery, every discipline is designed as a continuation of our architectural standard.

Apropos.label: Behind the Transformation
Apropos.quote: Architecture is both an artistic act and a technical responsibility. Every project we deliver must be beautiful, solid, sustainable and useful.
Apropos.description: Soukaina Elaouad leads EAI with a clear standard: unite architectural vision, engineering rigor and delivery culture to transform ambitions into durable places.
Apropos.cred1: Architect engineer and founder of EAI
Apropos.cred2: Premium project leadership in Morocco and internationally
Apropos.cred3: Integrated approach to architecture, BIM and execution

Events.label: ELAOUAD EVENTS
whyItems: Meet interior design specifiers, manufacturers and decision makers.
Present materials, solutions and expertise to a qualified audience.
Activate commercial opportunities across Morocco, Africa and international markets.

Cinematic.label: Process
Cinematic.title: From vision to matter
Cinematic.step1Desc: Read the site, clarify uses and place the first lines.
Cinematic.step2Desc: Align architecture, BIM, structure and engineering before construction.
Cinematic.step3Desc: Transform intent into a durable, precise and inhabited place.
